score_components.formula_applied: Cannot apply - video is instructional/educational, not a performance assessment

confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows a compilation of medical education and simulation content spanning multiple domains (laparoscopic surgery, ultrasound, VR surgery, airway management, ACLS). It includes instructor lectures in Ukrainian, equipment demonstrations, student observations, and brief glimpses of various simulation platforms. This is definitively instructional/educational material, not a recorded FLS task performance by a single trainee. No timing data, scoring interface, or task-specific completion can be assessed.

video_type_summary: This is a comprehensive medical simulation educational video featuring: (1) FLS bench-top equipment overview and instrument handling, (2) instructor-led lectures on the history and application of medical simulation, (3) demonstrations of multiple simulation modalities including high-fidelity manikins, ultrasound trainers, VR platforms, and airway simulators, and (4) observations of student engagement. The content spans multiple medical training domains and is clearly designed for educational/training purposes rather than individual task assessment.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper laparoscopic instrument grasping and orientation
Ultrasound probe technique on simulation model
verbal_cues: Historical context of medical simulation (Ludovico Cigoli references)
Simulation application in aviation training (Airbus training center reference)
Educational value of structured simulation programs
common_errors_addressed: Importance of proper instrument grip position to avoid fumbling
Correct probe orientation for ultrasound imaging
Hand positioning for effective chest compressions

scoring_decision: NO SCORE ASSIGNED - This video is instructional/educational content, not a recorded FLS task performance. It contains lecturer presentations, group demonstrations, and multi-domain simulation exposure rather than individual trainee assessment of a specific MISTELS task. Per assessment instructions, instructional videos are NOT scored; teaching content is extracted only.
